name: medlearn
description: Submit exactly one explicit MedLearnHandoff through the authenticated MedLearn MCP workflow.

interface.longDescription: Submits exactly one explicitly selected or provided MedLearnHandoff through the authenticated MedLearn intake pipeline. It must not scan other sources, infer missing evidence, alter the handoff, auto-approve content, or auto-publish.
defaultPrompt: Process exactly one MedLearnHandoff 0.1.0 explicitly selected or explicitly provided by the user in the current context.
If no single handoff is selected, or more than one handoff is a candidate, stop and ask the user to select exactly one.
Do not search or inspect other chats, Project Sources, project memory, files, or conversation history for additional evidence.

Do not infer, rewrite, summarize, correct, supplement, or add concepts, claims, learner evidence, misconceptions, corrections, unresolved questions, unfinished topics, learning goals, or any other handoff field.
Require handoff_version to equal 0.1.0 and require learning_goals and unfinished_topics to be empty until the conversion boundary supports them.
Pass the handoff object unchanged to submit_learning_handoff. Do not JSON-encode it as a string, call HTTP directly, or use another submission tool.
Do not auto-approve, auto-publish, or represent a successful submission as published knowledge.
On success return only status, job_id, intake_digest, and the returned counts. On failure return the stable error code without fallback.
